title: Ceviche
ingredients: 500 g of fresh white fish fillet, cubed
instructions: Step 1. Place the fish in a bowl and cover with the lemon juice; let it rest until the fish is opaque and well marinated.
Step 2. Add the red onion, tomato, cilantro, and salt to taste, mixing gently.
Step 3. Add the Worcestershire sauce and ketchup.
Step 4. Serve the ceviche cold, accompanied by Zambos Plantain chips to use as a scoop when eating.
